page: Microsoft Azure M128bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8473C processor operating at 4.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, relying instead on external block storage with Premium Storage capabilities.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core capabilities and exceptional memory throughput. The server achieves top-tier status in memory bandwidth for both cached small blocks and uncached large blocks, alongside top-tier multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark CPU scores. Database operations and Redis SET operations also rank in the top tier, demonstrating high efficiency for transactional workloads. However, single-core performance is moderate, with stress-ng single-core CPU and PassMark memory scores landing in the average category.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the M128bs_v3 offers high resource density and massive memory capacity suitable for enterprise-scale workloads without the added cost of local storage or GPU hardware. The primary tradeoff is the reliance on external block storage, which requires network and storage configuration to match the high memory bandwidth. This server is designed for memory-intensive and compute-heavy workloads, including large-scale database operations, high-throughput web serving, and multi-threaded data processing.
description: Microsoft Azure M128bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a 128-vCPU Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPUs. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, multi-threaded decompression, and database operations, though single-core performance remains average. This configuration is highly efficient for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large databases and high-throughput web serving, where massive memory capacity and strong multi-core processing are required.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor, delivering top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 platform featuring 1024 GB of RAM and exceptional memory bandwidth for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

1024.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core

Optimized for external Premium Storage with no local storage overhead
